notes: Arrow has no historical runtime art pack; gameplay is Canvas2D primitives. Result ribbons, menu chrome, and saga chips are v2 design-owned seed assets used to satisfy the shared UI sprite contract.

design/assets/gear.svg.provenance: Generated v2 settings icon for the Arrow menu chrome.

design/assets/header_route.svg.provenance: Generated v2 header route art for the Arrow saga menu.

design/assets/level_node_completed.svg.provenance: Generated v2 completed-state chip for the Arrow saga rail.

design/assets/level_node_current.svg.provenance: Generated v2 current-state chip for the Arrow saga rail.

design/assets/level_node_default.svg.provenance: Generated v2 fallback chip for the Arrow saga rail.

design/assets/level_node_locked.svg.provenance: Generated v2 locked-state chip for the Arrow saga rail.

design/assets/ribbon_win.svg.provenance: Generated v2 seed ribbon for the Arrow win ResultCard.

design/assets/ribbon_lose.svg.provenance: Generated v2 seed ribbon for the Arrow fail ResultCard.
